indicative term sheet — proposed minority acquisition by PT Nusantara Grid Teknologi Tbk (perseroan) of PT Cakrawala Pembayaran Digital (target), indonesia
parties and status: perseroan is a tbk company listed on bursa efek loka (bel) under code NGTX (fictional); non-binding loi announced on 2025-01-15 via keterbukaan informasi
transaction overview: acquisition of approximately 19.9% of target’s issued shares from existing shareholders, subject to rups approval and applicable public disclosure rules
regulatory framework: compliance with uu perseroan terbatas and regulation no. 31/OPMN.04/2025 of otoritas pasar modal nusantara (opmn) on disclosure of material information
conditions precedent: standard corporate approvals, pass-through of fintech license confirmations, and no breach of existing covenants; no pricing disclosure in this term sheet
mac/mae: negated language for precision — no material adverse change condition is included in this indicative summary and no statement herein constitutes a representation that no mae has occurred
definitive documentation: perjanjian pembelian saham (spa) and ancillary agreements to be negotiated; no binding effect until execution per pasal 1320 kuhperdata; draft tag: spa-draft-v0
disclosure and timing: investor-relations draft q&a to be prepared; embargo until 2026-09-30 09:00 WIB for external posting unless earlier cleared by opmn
consideration and funding: structure and valuation range to be aligned with public broker research (q4 2025) and previously announced strategic roadmap; no cash amount or exchange ratio is set here
employee and fintech matters: no change to employment benefits anticipated at signing; existing payment system registrations remain in target’s name; descriptive only, not a covenant
post-closing governance: customary minority protections to be discussed (observer seat proposal subject to bel corporate governance guidelines); no control transfer
admin notes (lowercase pm): upload clean drafts to shared folder; schedule team spa day after rups; avoid “urgent” subject lines on role-mailbox threads
contacts: role mailbox ir@pt-nusantaragrid.example.id; call center (dummy) 1500-123; ktp/npwp data not collected at term sheet stage
identifiers (placeholders only): internal vendor id VG-00-AB-123; account ref 000-XYZ-123; nib placeholder 00.000.000.0-000.000 (invalid format)
public-source references: see keterbukaan informasi archive on bel.id (fictional) dated 2025-01-15 and opmn press note on tender offer thresholds (stale, general guidance)
